applicability_notes: Merges N sibling tensors (branches sharing upstream producers) along {DIM}. Common fusion targets: [cls_token, patch_embeddings] prepend, [cos, sin] sinusoidal embeddings, [q_nope, q_rope] head concat, [latent, latent] CFG duplication, [upsampled, skip] UNet skip connections, KV-cache append [cache_k, k].

placement_observations.size_descriptor: per-device matmul output shards [1,1,32,size_per_device], decode-regime small
placement_observations.source: model call site: output = ttnn.concat(outputs, dim=-1, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG if not use_prefetcher else ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, sub_core_grids=...)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: per-device matmul output shards [1,1,32,size_per_device], ring_mm/prefetcher mode
placement_observations.source: model call site: output = ttnn.concat(outputs, dim=-1, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG ...) followed by ttnn.to_memory_config reshard for ring_mm

placement_observations.size_descriptor: layernorm pre-allgather stats, height 32, narrow width (per-device stats columns)
placement_observations.source: test: tt_pre_allgather_output = ttnn.to_memory_config(t, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); tt_global_stats = ttnn.concat(tt_stats_list, -1)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: global layernorm stats (32, padded_width), single-tile-row regime
placement_observations.source: test: interleaved concat output then ttnn.to_memory_config(tt_global_stats, create_sharded_memory_config(shape=(32, padded_shape[-1]), 1-core grid, ShardStrategy.WIDTH))
model call site: embedding_output = ttnn.concat([cls_token, patch_embeddings], -2, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) followed by to_layout(TILE)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: segformer decode-head fused hidden states, 4 NHWC feature maps concat on channels (dim=3)
placement_observations.source: model call site: concated_tensor = ttnn.concat(all_hidden_states[::-1], dim=3, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG) then to_layout(TILE, bfloat8_b)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: CNN activation NHWC tensors concat on channel dim (UNet/YOLO skip-connection merge)
placement_observations.source: model call site: output = ttnn.concat(input_tensors, dim, memory_config=output_sharded_memory_config) where output_sharded_memory_config = create_sharded_memory_config(..., strategy=ttnn.ShardStrategy.HEIGHT)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: MLA decode q heads [1, bsz, heads_local, qk_nope+qk_rope] (e.g. 1,32,16,576), decode-small
placement_observations.source: model call site: tt_q = ttnn.concat([tt_q_nope, tt_q_rope], dim=-1, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); inputs also moved to L1 via to_memory_config beforehand

placement_observations.size_descriptor: shared-expert + MoE expert outputs combined before reduce_scatter
placement_observations.source: model call site: shared_expert_out = ttnn.to_memory_config(shared_expert_out, ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG); combined_out = ttnn.concat([mlp_out, shared_expert_out], dim=0)
model call site: inputs_embeds_tt = ttnn.concat([inputs_embeds_tt, pad_zeros], dim=2, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: host-side / replicated position-id row tensors, batch concat dim=0
placement_observations.source: model call site: position_ids_tt built with memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT; return ttnn.concat(position_ids_tt, dim=0)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: per-group split outputs (interleaved DRAM) before final width concat
placement_observations.source: test: per_group_results items moved to ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, then tt_output_tensor = ttnn.concat(per_group_results, dim=-1)
